# CWE-41 positive: path equivalence via dot segments
lang: go
file: CWE-41-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-41 Improper Resolution of Path Equivalence
// Vulnerable line: rejects ".." but allows "./" and "//" aliases.
func ReadSharedNote(c *gin.Context) {
	root := "/srv/notes"
	rel := c.Query("path")
	if strings.Contains(rel, "..") {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "bad path"})
		return
	}
	full := filepath.Join(root, rel)
	body, err := os.ReadFile(full)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, string(body))
}
